q: Are these courses suitable for beginners?
a: Yes, many of our programs are designed with beginners in mind. We offer foundation courses that start from the basics and gradually progress to advanced topics. We also provide pre-course materials to help you prepare.

q: Do I need a technical background?
a: No technical background is required for most of our beginner courses. Our curriculum is designed to take you from the fundamentals to advanced concepts step by step. Basic computer skills and a willingness to learn are all you need.

q: What courses are offered under AI?
a:
We offer a structured path that covers:
• Foundations of AI & ML (Python, Statistics etc.)
• Machine Learning & Deep Learning
• Natural Language Processing (NLP)
• Generative AI & Large Language Models (LLMs)
• AI for Business & Industry Use Cases
• Capstone Projects & Portfolio Development

q: What kind of placement assistance do you provide?
a: We offer comprehensive placement support including resume building, LinkedIn profile optimization, interview preparation, mock interviews with industry experts, and exclusive access to job opportunities through our 100+ hiring partners.

q: Why should I choose Analytics Circle over other institutes?
a:
• Practical, hands-on training with real-world case studies
• Expert trainers with industry experience.
• Flexible learning modes (Classroom + Online).
• Placement assistance and career mentorship.
• Affordable pricing with EMI options.
• A strong community of learners, alumni, and mentors.

q: What if I miss a live session?
a: All live sessions are recorded and available for review throughout your course access period. You can watch them at your convenience and reach out to instructors with questions during dedicated doubt-clearing sessions.
